'''Alain''' was a [[Human/Legends|Human]] [[Private/Legends|private]] in the [[Alliance to Restore the Republic/Legends|Alliance to Restore the Republic]] during the [[Galactic Civil War/Legends|Galactic Civil War]], fighting for the oppressed inhabitants of [[The galaxy/Legends|the galaxy]]. The Alliance valued his connections on the [[Outer Rim Territories/Legends|Outer Rim Territories]], and Alain served as an [[Alliance Fleet/Legends|Alliance Fleet]] [[Trooper/Legends|trooper]]<ref name="JKTCG" /> aboard the [[CR90 corvette/Legends|CR90 corvette]] [[Tantive IV/Legends|''Tantive IV'']]<ref name="CSWE">{{CSWECite|I|17|Alain, Private}}</ref> at some point prior to its [[Battle of Tatooine (Galactic Civil War)|destruction]]<ref name="DB">{{DB|starship|tantiveiv|Rebel blockade runners}} establishes the [[Tantive IV/Legends|''Tantive IV'']] was destroyed during the [[Battle of Tatooine (Galactic Civil War)|Battle of Tatooine]].</ref> in [[0 BBY/Legends|0 BBY]].<ref name="NEC">''[[The New Essential Chronology]]'' dates the [[Battle of Tatooine (Galactic Civil War)|Battle of Tatooine]], during which the [[Tantive IV/Legends|''Tantive IV'']] was destroyed, to [[0 BBY/Legends|0 BBY]].</ref> He was his [[unit]]'s [[Scavenger/Legends|scavenger]]. Alain was fair-skinned with dark [[Hair/Legends|hair]].<ref name="JKTCG" /> During his service aboard the ''Tantive IV'', Alain wore the standard Rebel [[Fleet/Legends|fleet]] trooper [[Alliance military uniform/Legends|uniform]].<ref name="Rebel Alliance Sourcebook">[[The Rebel Alliance Sourcebook (Second Edition)|''The Rebel Alliance Sourcebook'', Second Edition]] includes a depiction of the standard [[Alliance Fleet/Legends|Alliance Fleet]] [[Rebel trooper/Legends|trooper]] uniforms, which matches the outfit worn by Alain.</ref> Alain was an idealistic [[Rebel trooper/Legends|Rebel trooper]] whom the Alliance valued for his Outer Rim connections.<ref name="CSWE" /> He wielded a [[DH-17 blaster pistol/Legends|DH-17 blaster pistol]].<ref name="JKTCG" />

==Behind the scenes==
Alain was first mentioned on a card for the [[2001]] [[Premiere (Jedi Knights TCG)|''Premiere'']] edition of [[Decipher]]'s ''[[Jedi Knights Trading Card Game]]''.<ref name="JKTCG" />
